title: Agents' Last Exam
creator: 0x74A900b702c5103B5D588D7D8e265c4B972e08Ff
summary: 从广覆盖设计、Generalist CUA-agent、运行回路到 experiment 配置，重新理解 ALE 如何把 Agent 评估拉回“工作是否真的完成”。

workflow.label: Research the requested topic
workflow.detail: Re-read the Zread theme page and refreshed the facts against the current GitHub README, example_exp.yaml, and pyproject.toml.

workflow.label: Rewrite the editorial source
workflow.detail: Rebuilt the Chinese source document around the current public scope: 150 reference tasks, 55 industries, a 1,500+ corpus subset, and the ALE runtime model.

workflow.label: Generate the Slidev deck
workflow.detail: Regenerated the deck with design-system components including IslandCoverSlide, SectionDivider, CardGrid + IslandCard, CalloutCard, TwoColumnLayout, ProjectStructurePanel, and DefaultClosingSlide.

workflow.label: Write the narration script
workflow.detail: Regenerated the narration script to match the new slide structure, about 8.5 minutes end to end.

workflow.label: Verify the Slidev build
workflow.detail: Ran bun run build twice; the second pass followed layout fixes found during visual review and completed successfully.

workflow.label: Inspect final slide states
workflow.detail: Checked the deck at localhost:3040, verified 18 slides, and repaired two v-click grid pages so their final click states rendered correctly.

workflow.label: Generate narration audio
workflow.detail: Skipped because this rerun explicitly excludes TTS and the downstream audio pipeline.

workflow.label: Render the final video
workflow.detail: Skipped because this rerun explicitly excludes the video-generation workflow.
